author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source Claude plugin capability inventory docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: Claude plugin capability inventory is duplicated and already drifting between docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:45-83 and plugins/pm-claude/README.md:5-14 plus :101-174. The docs repeat counts and inventories for MCP tools, skills, slash commands, subagents, install modes, and pm_run actions. Current drift: docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:83 says 9 slash commands, while plugins/pm-claude/README.md:11 says 14; plugins/pm-claude/README.md:12 says 3 subagents but lists 4. Existing pm-rjgh covers PRD/CHANGELOG/marketplace/AGENTS hygiene and pm-js0r covers wrapper/smoke code, not this docs inventory drift.

One Claude plugin document is canonical for capability inventory; the other surface routes to it or uses generated inventory; slash command/subagent/tool counts agree with actual plugin files; docs-skills gate and relevant plugin smoke/docs checks pass.

author: codex-dedupe-agent
message: Start docs dedupe for Claude plugin capability inventory as part of combined single-source docs PR.

value.author: codex-docs-dedupe-lane
value.text: Evidence from docs/plugin single-source lane (read-only, 2026-05-25): actual Claude plugin inventory from files is plugins/pm-claude/.claude-plugin/plugin.json + .mcp.json + hooks/hooks.json/session-start.mjs, 14 slash command files, 5 skill files, 4 agent files, script launcher, README. Actual MCP server source exposes 18 tools: pm_run plus 17 narrow tools including pm_plan. Drift found: docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md architecture tree and install section still say 9 slash commands and one agent/coordination surface, while plugins/pm-claude/README.md says 14 slash commands and lists all 14 command files. README says "3 subagents" but lists 4 agent files and plugin.json description also says 3. scripts/smoke-claude-plugin.mjs is stale too: comments say 18 required tools and 9 commands, but the required MCP list omits pm_plan and the pluginFiles array only checks 9 command files plus one agent; it can pass while docs drift. Recommendation: make plugins/pm-claude/README.md the canonical user-facing capability inventory because it is closest to install/user surface; make docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md the architecture/testing page and either route capability counts to README or replace the static tree with a compact "inventory comes from files under plugins/pm-claude/{commands,skills,agents}" note. Smallest edit: update counts to 14 commands/5 skills/4 agents wherever counts remain, or avoid counts outside the canonical README; fix smoke script metadata/checks to enumerate all current command and agent files and include pm_plan in required tools.

value.note: smoke test inventory updated for 14 commands,4 agents,and pm_plan
